title: Enchanted
description: Changes the xp bar to the standard galactic alphabet
body:
## What is Enchanted?
Simply put, Enchanted turns your xp bar into enchantment text, also known as the Standard Galactic Alphabet.
This gives it a more magical feel than the vanilla bar, being just a flat line of green.

### What is the Standard Galactic Alphabet?
The Standard Galactic Alphabet (or SGA) is a fictional script that several games including Minecraft use. It can be found in the enchanting table.

### Credits
This pack was made by Sukuro120 on planetminecraft. This pack has been ported to modrinth with their permission with the intent of keeping it updated to the latest version.

Original pack: [xp bar to enchantment text](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/exp-bar-to-enchantment-text/)
